name: create_object
description: Generic tool to create a Snowflake object including database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository.

object_type.description: Type of Snowflake object. One of database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository

target_object.description: Always pass properties of target_object as an object, not a string

name: drop_object
description: Generic tool to drop a Snowflake object including database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository.

object_type.description: Type of Snowflake object. One of database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository

target_object.description: Always pass properties of target_object as an object, not a string

if_exists.description: If true, drop the object only if it exists

name: create_or_alter_object
description: Generic tool to create or alter a Snowflake object including database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository.

object_type.description: Type of Snowflake object. One of database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository

target_object.description: Always pass properties of target_object as an object, not a string

name: describe_object
description: Generic tool to describe a Snowflake object including database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository.

object_type.description: Type of Snowflake object. One of database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository

target_object.description: Always pass properties of target_object as an object, not a string

name: list_objects
description: Generic tool to list Snowflake objects including database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository.

object_type.description: Type of Snowflake object. One of database, schema, table, view, warehouse, compute_pool, role, stage, user, image_repository

database_name.description: Name of the database to list objects in

schema_name.description: Name of the schema to list objects in

like.description: Filter objects by keyword in name. Uses case-insensitive pattern matching, with support for SQL wildcard characters (% and _).

starts_with.description: Filter objects by start of name. Case sensitive. Ignored for warehouses.

name: run_snowflake_query
description: Run a SQL query in Snowflake. DML and DDL queries are supported. Tool should only be used if other tools do not suffice.

name: list_semantic_views
description: List semantic views in Snowflake with filtering support.

database_name.description: Name of the database to list semantic views in

schema_name.description: Name of the schema to list semantic views in

like.description: Filter semantic views by keyword in name. Case insensitive.

starts_with.description: Filter semantic views by start of name. Case sensitive.

name: describe_semantic_view
description: Get detailed information about a specific semantic view.

database_name.description: The name of the database containing the semantic view

schema_name.description: The name of the schema containing the semantic view

view_name.description: The name of the semantic view

name: show_semantic_dimensions
description: Show semantic dimensions available in a semantic view.

database_name.description: The name of the database to show semantic dimensions in

schema_name.description: The name of the schema to show semantic dimensions in

view_name.description: The name of the semantic view to show dimensions in

like.description: Filter semantic views by keyword in name. Case insensitive.

starts_with.description: Filter semantic views by start of name. Case sensitive.

name: show_semantic_metrics
description: Show semantic metrics available in a semantic view.

database_name.description: The name of the database to show semantic metrics in

schema_name.description: The name of the schema to show semantic metrics in

view_name.description: The name of the semantic view to show metrics in

like.description: Filter semantic views by keyword in name. Case insensitive.

starts_with.description: Filter semantic views by start of name. Case sensitive.

name: get_semantic_view_ddl
description: Get the DDL for a semantic view.

database_name.description: The name of the database to get the DDL for the semantic view in

schema_name.description: The name of the schema to get the DDL for the semantic view in

view_name.description: The name of the semantic view to get the DDL for

name: write_semantic_view_query_tool
description: Writes a query statement to query a semantic view using DIMENSIONS, METRICS, and/or FACTS. Supports optional WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT clauses. Query statement cannot combine FACTS and METRICS in same query. Use tool if asked to create a query to query a semantic view.

database_name.description: The name of the database containing the semantic view

schema_name.description: The name of the schema containing the semantic view

view_name.description: The name of the semantic view to query

dimensions.description: List of dimensions to include in the query. Each dimension should specify table and name/expression.

metrics.description: List of metrics to include in the query. Each metric should specify table and name. Cannot be used with facts.

facts.description: List of facts to include in the query. Each fact should specify table and name. Cannot be used with metrics.

where_clause.description: Optional WHERE clause conditions (without the WHERE keyword)

order_by.description: Optional ORDER BY clause (without the ORDER BY keywords)

limit.description: Optional LIMIT for number of rows to return

name: query_semantic_view
description: Writes and runs a statement to query a semantic view using DIMENSIONS, METRICS, and/or FACTS. Supports optional WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT clauses. Query statement cannot combine FACTS and METRICS in same query. Use tool if asked to query a semantic view directly.

database_name.description: The name of the database containing the semantic view

schema_name.description: The name of the schema containing the semantic view

view_name.description: The name of the semantic view to query

dimensions.description: List of dimensions to include in the query. Each dimension should specify table and name/expression.

metrics.description: List of metrics to include in the query. Each metric should specify table and name. Cannot be used with facts.

facts.description: List of facts to include in the query. Each fact should specify table and name. Cannot be used with metrics.

where_clause.description: Optional WHERE clause conditions (without the WHERE keyword)

order_by.description: Optional ORDER BY clause (without the ORDER BY keywords)

limit.description: Optional LIMIT for number of rows to return

name: cortex_agent
description: Cortex Agent tool that combines structured and unstructured data querying and may include additional custom tools in a configured Cortex Agent object in Snowflake. Each service can be identified by its database_name, schema_name, and service_name. The user's query string is passed to the agent service as the query parameter.

service_name.description: Name of the Cortex Agent Service

database_name.description: Target database containing the agent service

schema_name.description: Target schema containing the agent service

query.description: User query to submit to Cortex Agent

name: cortex_search
description: Search tool that performs semantic search against a configured Cortex Search service using Snowflake's REST API. Supports filtering, column selection, and limit for refined search results. Each service can be identified by its database_name, schema_name, and service_name. Columns and filters are optional.

service_name.description: Name of the Cortex Search Service

database_name.description: Target database containing the search service

schema_name.description: Target schema containing the search service

query.description: User query to search in search service

columns.description: Optional list of columns to return for each relevant result in the response

filter_query.description: Optional filter query dictionary supporting operators like @eq, @contains, @gte, @lte, @and, @or, @not

limit.description: Optional limit on the number of results to return (must be between 0 and 1000)

name: cortex_analyst
description: Analyst tool that performs natural language to SQL conversion against a configured Cortex Analyst service using Snowflake's REST API. Supports semantic model or semantic view. Each service can be identified by its service_name and semantic_model. The value of the semantic_model should be a fully-qualified path to a YAML semantic file or Snowflake Semantic View (e.g., '@my_db.my_schema.my_stage/my_semantic_file.yaml' or 'MY_DB.MY_SCH.MY_SEMANTIC_VIEW').

service_name.description: Name of the Cortex Analyst Service

semantic_model.description: Fully qualified path to YAML semantic file or Snowflake Semantic View

query.description: Natural language query to submit to Cortex Analyst
